landing.heading: Craft Professional Resumes
landing.description: Create job-winning resumes with expertly designed templates. ATS-friendly, recruiter-approved, and tailored to your career goals.

features.title: Why Choose ResumeXpert
features.subtitle: Everything you need to create a professional resume that stands out.

lightningFast.title: Lightning Fast
lightningFast.description: Create professional resumes in under 5 minutes with our streamlined process

proTemplates.title: Pro Templates
proTemplates.description: Choose from dozens of recruiter-approved, industry-specific templates

instantExport.title: Instant Export
instantExport.description: Download high-quality PDFs instantly with perfect formatting

cta.title: Ready to Build Your Standout Resume
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of professionals who landed their dream jobs with our platform

dashboard.title: My Resume
dashboard.emptyText: You haven't created any resumes yet. Start building your professional resume

delete.title: Confirm Deletion
delete.message: Are you sure you want to delete this resume? This action cannot be undone.

validation.datesRequired: Start and End dates are required in experience {{index}}
validation.eduDatesRequired: Start and End dates are required in education {{index}}
validation.skillNameRequired: Skill name is required in skill {{index}}
validation.skillProgressRange: Skill progress must be between 1 and 100 in skill {{index}}
validation.projectTitleRequired: Project Title is required in project {{index}}
validation.projectDescRequired: Project description is required in project {{index}}
validation.certTitleRequired: Certification Title is required in certification {{index}}
validation.languageRequired: At least one language is required
validation.interestRequired: At least one interest is required

toast.pdfErrorDetail: Failed to generate PDF. Please try again.

workExperience.title: Work Experience
workExperience.descriptionPlaceholder: What did you do in this role?

login.title: Welcome Back
login.subtitle: Sign in to continue building amazing resumes

errors.default: Something went wrong. Please try again.
Something went wrong. Please try again.

createResumeForm.title: Create New Resume
createResumeForm.description: Give your resume a title to get started. You can customize everything later
createResumeForm.failed: Failed to create resume, please try again later

templateThemeConfigurator.title: Theme Settings
templateThemeConfigurator.description: This template supports colors, fonts, and density controls, and community templates will reuse the same parameter contract.

templateBlockConfigurator.title: Template Block System
templateBlockConfigurator.description: Control block visibility, titles, order, and column placement. This is the foundation of Phase G freeform creation.

resumeVersionManager.empty: There are no saved versions yet. Save one to get started.

themeSelector.previewDescription: Browse templates and preview them live here. Once selected, the template is applied directly to the current resume without editing theme parameters on this screen.
themeSelector.templateListDescription: Pick a template on the left and preview it on the right.
themeSelector.previewHelp: Render the current resume content live and apply it to the editor once everything looks right.

settingsPage.title: Account & Preferences
settingsPage.description: Manage your basic profile, login password, and language preferences here so your account stays aligned with the way you work.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: This first version only supports updating the display name. Account identity and role remain read-only.

password.title: Change Password
password.description: This first version lets you set a new password directly without entering the old one. The new password must be at least 8 characters.
password.label: New Password
password.placeholder: Enter a new login password (at least 8 characters)

language.title: Language Preference
language.description: Reuse the existing language switcher. Changes take effect immediately and are stored locally.

errors.passwordRequired: This share page is protected by an access code. Please enter it to continue.
errors.private: This share page is currently private.
errors.viewLimitReached: This share page has reached its view limit.
errors.notFound: This share page is closed or does not exist.
errors.loadFailed: Failed to load the share page. Please try again later.

hero.title: Output & Share Center
hero.description: Bring PDF export, share publishing, and access governance into one console. Manage public links, traffic stats, and a reliable PDF delivery flow here.

resumeSelector.title: Select Resume
resumeSelector.description: Pick a resume first, then manage export, sharing, and access governance.
resumeSelector.empty: There are no resumes ready for output yet. Create one first.
resumeSelector.unselectedHint: Select a resume above and the share console will show export actions, link management, traffic stats, and output history.

share.title: Share Status
share.managementDescription: Link status, access restrictions, and governance notes all live in one publishing panel.
share.publicLinkEmpty: There is no share link yet. Create one below.
share.governanceHint: The public page shows the snapshot from the most recent republish. If you just edited the resume, republish again to update the public page.

placeholders.governanceNotes: Governance notes, for example: only for this week's applications

export.title: One-Click Resume Output
export.description: The output center currently keeps PDF export only, for the most stable and direct delivery flow.

history.title: Export History
history.description: Keep document export and share publishing records together so every output action is easy to review.
history.empty: There are no PDF export or share publishing records yet.

preview.title: Output Preview
preview.description: PDF export and the public share page reuse the same render result.

toasts.loadCenterFailed: Failed to load the output center
toasts.loadResumeBundleFailed: Failed to load resume output data
toasts.pdfCloneFailed: Failed to prepare the render node. Refresh the page and try again.
toasts.pdfCanvasFailed: Snapshot rendering failed. Check whether the template content is too long or the styles are abnormal.
toasts.pdfExportFailed: Browser PDF export failed. Please try again later.

adminPage.title: Admin Console
adminPage.description: Handle template reviews and user management in one place, including account toggles and password resets.
adminPage.noPermissionTitle: This account does not have admin access
adminPage.noPermissionDescription: The admin console has been split out and is only available to users with the `admin` role.
adminPage.reviewQueueDescription: Process community submissions here without crowding the user-facing template center.
adminPage.noPendingTemplates: There are no pending templates right now.

templateReview.reviewNotesPlaceholder: Record approval reasons, change requests, or rejection notes
templateReview.previewDescription: Admins can inspect structure and render output here without taking space from the user-facing workflow.

userManagement.title: User List
userManagement.description: Search, filter, inspect details, and perform password resets or account status changes.

passwordReset.title: Reset Password
passwordReset.description: Admins set a new password directly here without introducing an email flow.
passwordReset.placeholder: Enter a new temporary password (at least 8 characters)

toasts.loadReviewQueueFailed: Failed to load the review queue
toasts.loadUsersFailed: Failed to load the user list

templatesPage.title: Template Management Center
templatesPage.description: Browse official templates, preview community templates, and manage your own template assets in one place. Applying templates has moved back to the resume editor.
templatesPage.listDescription: Use this area to find templates and switch the preview target.
templatesPage.readonlyHint: Official and community templates stay read-only. Duplicate one into your own library before editing its layout.
templatesPage.previewDescription: This area is only for checking the look of a template. It does not apply templates.
templatesPage.workbenchDescription: The right side is now a single-panel switcher that shows only the selected settings area.
templatesPage.detailsDescription: Manage template name, description, category, submission note, and layout configuration.
templatesPage.ownedHint: This is your template. You can continue maintaining and submitting it.
templatesPage.officialHint: This is an official template and only supports previewing and favoriting.
templatesPage.unsavedDetails: You have unsaved template changes. Remember to save before leaving this page.
templatesPage.layoutDescription: Only theme settings and block layout are changed here. No real resume content is modified.
templatesPage.layoutOwnedHint: Your own template can be recolored, re-fonted, and rearranged directly.
templatesPage.layoutReadonlyHint: This template is read-only. Duplicate it before editing the layout.
templatesPage.unsavedLayout: Layout changes are not saved yet. Save the template before they become part of your template asset.
templatesPage.layoutReadonlyHelp: This template cannot be edited directly. Duplicate it first, then come back here to adjust colors, fonts, layout mode, and block order.
templatesPage.createDescription: Create a new personal template asset that you can continue editing, deleting, or submitting later.
templatesPage.createDraftHint: This draft template has not been created yet. After submission it will enter your template list and return to the details panel automatically.
templatesPage.createDescriptionPlaceholder: Describe the scenario, style, and audience this template fits
templatesPage.empty: No templates matched. Try switching filters or clearing the search keywords.
templatesPage.actionsDescription: Favoriting, community submission, and personal-template management stay here. Template application has moved back to the editor theme modal.

toasts.duplicated: Duplicated to your template library. You can continue editing the layout now.
toasts.submitFailed: Failed to submit for community review
toasts.onlyOwnedEditable: Only your own templates can be edited
toasts.onlyOwnedSubmittable: Only your own templates can be submitted to the community
